chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 41 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.148/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.149/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 13.03.2023 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Bhayo, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 & 3. Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks protection against the harassment allegedly being caused by the private respondents. It appears that the petitioner earlier preferred Cr. Misc. Application No.420/2023, which was disposed of by the Additional Sessions Judge/ Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Pano Aqil vide order dated 22.02.2023 directing to S.S.P. Sukkur to provide legal protection to the applicant on her appearance in accordance with law. It is an admitted position that after passing of aforesaid order, the petitioner has not approached to S.S.P. Sukkur; hence, this petition being devoid of merits is dismissed in limine along with listed application, leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the S.S.P. concerned for redressal of her grievance. J U D G E Abdul Basit
